response.step_by_step_log:
1. Reviewed video content. Identified the conversation segment (00:00-02:06) and the singing segment (02:07-04:59). 
2. Identified song title 'ギガンティックO.T.N' (Gigantic O.T.N) from on-screen text.
3. Identified composer 'GigaP' from on-screen text.
4. Used search tool to find Japanese lyrics and English translations for 'Gigantic O.T.N' by GigaP.
5. Formatted lyrics and added to scene JSON.
response.global_summary: The video starts with VTubers Laplus Darkness and Hakui Koyori discussing an upcoming "onee-san live" event. It transitions into a performance of the song "Gigantic O.T.N" by GigaP, featuring both characters.

scenes.description: VTubers Laplus Darkness and Hakui Koyori have a casual conversation about an event. No singing occurs.
The song 'Gigantic O.T.N' plays. The performers Laplus Darkness and Hakui Koyori are singing and dancing on stage. Music by GigaP.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Contrary to popular belief
This is all a show, a fallacy
Of sweat and x&t&c
And lonely love emergencies!
Emotions and attachment don’t get sucked into those
Because my appeal comes from my sucking, right?
Just kidding, kidding, kidding, kidding!
All human beings seem to like things just like this:
A self-satisfied orgasmic nation
Overflowing over and over!
Respect the flimsy terms of service
The currency, faked "I love you"s
On hard level I’ll let you choose
My 8-point love vali garm anda!
It’s swelling up it’s starting to get dangerous
Take me to the peak come on and hurry up
I’ll please you and tease you with sweet lies like "I love you"
And get right inside your identi-ti-ti-ty!
Don’t come to hate this dreamy boy just because
I’ve gotten good at giving people what they want
I will delude you and indulge in your frustration
I’m going berserk, with my gigantic, ah –
But don’t you look away from it okay? Hey?

With an un deux trois in your boudoir
We wake and say “vous… avec moi?!”
We’ll keep this as our secret, this one little lie is still innocent!
But this don’t change a thing for me:
The ruler of a monarchy
The absolute with girth and might
And hey, that’s why you like me, right?
I’ll welcome you to paradise, my own domain and private world
With all the breathing throbbing and —
Be gentle with it, you dumb girl!
A sweet whisper of "I want you"
Will bring it out of its shell for sure
We’ve been playing in easy mode
It’s time to drive in danger mode—
Like touching a switch every rich dirty bitch is bewitched by my "magic" sighing, "I need you"
Crap! I underestimated just what I was packing
Don’t say that it’s lacking
Let’s get back to our scheduled love game and cut the yapping!
It’s getting faster, a dangerous situation
I’ll show you who’s the best one in the nation!
With tactics and skillfulness this king will coolly rule
And shoot out a dose of plus-minus-plus stuff!
There’s no turning back, now we’ve both got a secret
But that’s okay, ‘cuz love is best with no regrets
Now do you understand? The strength of this love potion
It’s so gigantic, growing with your swift motions
Don’t get distracted here let’s focus back on me!

It’s swelling up it’s starting to get dangerous
Take me to the peak come on and hurry up
I’ll please you and tease you with sweet lies like "I love you"
And get right inside your identi-ti-ti-ty!
Don’t come to hate this dreamy boy just because
I’ve gotten good at giving people what they want
I will delude you and indulge in your frustration
I’m going berserk, with my gigantic, ah –
Let’s pinky swear, I’m not jealous but if you lie to me
I’ll take a .40 caliber and go trigger happy!
